ddls:
CREATE TABLE "championship_series" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each championship series */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the championship series took place */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the champion team */,
  "finalist_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the finalist team */,
  "schedule_length" INTEGER /* Length of the series schedule in games */,
  "series_score" TEXT /* Score of the series in terms of games won */,
  "mvp_player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the MVP player of the series */,
  "total_attendance" INTEGER /* Total attendance across all games in the series */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated by the series */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_championship_series_finalist_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("finalist_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_championship_series_champion_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("champion_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_championship_series_mvp_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("mvp_player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date when the team was founded */,
  "league_affiliation" TEXT /* League affiliation of the team */,
  "team_owner" TEXT /* Owner of the team */,
  "team_general_manager" TEXT /* General manager of the team */,
  "team_coach" TEXT /* Head coach of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is currently on */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the championship series the game is part of */,
  "game_number" INTEGER /* Game number within the series */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date when the game took place */,
  "game_score" TEXT /* Score of the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated by the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES championship_series ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player performance record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the performance is for */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who performed */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds collected by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals made by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks made by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fan_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fan engagement record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the engagement is for */,
  "fan_count" INTEGER /* Number of fans who attended the game */,
  "ticket_sales" REAL /* Total sales of tickets for the game */,
  "social_media_mentions" INTEGER /* Number of social media mentions for the game */,
  "hashtag_usage" TEXT /* Hashtags used for the game */,
  "sentiment_analysis" REAL /* Sentiment analysis of fan engagement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fan_engagement_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the prediction is for */,
  "predicted_winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the predicted winner team */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "prediction_method" TEXT /* Method used for the prediction */,
  "model_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the prediction model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_predicted_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("predicted_winner_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., fan, team staff, league official) */,
  "team_affiliation" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user is affiliated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the access is for */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission the user has */,
  "data_access" TEXT /* Type of data the user has access to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date when the article was published */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who wrote the article */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsorships" (
  "sponsorship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsorship */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the sponsorship is for */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "sponsorship_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the sponsorship */,
  "sponsorship_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the sponsorship */,
  "sponsorship_amount" REAL /* Amount of the sponsorship */,
  "sponsorship_type" TEXT /* Type of sponsorship (e.g., jersey, arena, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsorship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsorships_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the staff member is affiliated with */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Name of the staff member */,
  "staff_role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., coach, trainer, etc.) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_staff_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each official */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the official is assigned to */,
  "official_name" TEXT /* Name of the official */,
  "official_role" TEXT /* Role of the official (e.g., referee, umpire, etc.) */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the official */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_officials_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
